name: Fine Metal Technologies Public Company Limited
summary: Fine Metal Technologies Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes seamless copper tubes in Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Japan, and internationally. The company offers smooth, multi-grooved, accumulator, and capillary copper tubes. Its products are used as components in air-conditioner and refrigerator equipment. The company was formerly known as Furukawa Metal (Thailand) Public Company Limited and changed its name to Fine Metal Technologies Public Company Limited in November 2020. Fine Metal Technologies Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
